prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-ASRO-MADEINUSAGP-11IN-PARENT Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 11 Inch Heavy Duty Single Riffle Gold Pans Made in USA (Three Colors) Description: The ASR Outdoor heavy duty gold pan is designed and manufactured in the USA and features: 11 inch diameter, 5.5 inch base, lightweight design (0.36lbs), molded top edges for a comfortable grip, three large riffles, smooth and rough side walls, tough ABS plastic material content, are buoyant in water and importantly, rust resistant.

Not too big, not to small, the ASR Outdoor 11 inch gold pans are ideal for field testing, cleaning up concentrates or working through small to medium deposits. Suitable for all levels of gold panning, these gold pans feature three large riffles that can get through heavy black sand deposits; and as mentioned above, smooth and rough textured side walls for finishing concentrates, allowing for the efficient panning of materials, all in one convenient gold pan.

Durable and resistant to corrosion, these ASR Outdoor heavy duty plastic gold pans ensure longevity in the field and have little to no maintenance requirements. Lightweight design allows for longer use and less fatigue when gold panning. The 5.5 inch base and two wall types allow for maximum control when gold panning, especially for material that is screened and ready for finishing.

The ultimate and non negotiable tool for any gold prospector is the gold pan: look no further than ASR Outdoors Made in USA single riffle gold pans, designed for all skill levels. Good luck!

Available in three high visibility colors: pink, green or black. Search Terms: Made in usa; gold prospecting equipment; gold pans; outdoor gear; paydirt; sluice box; gold mining kit; camping gifts for men; gold rush; prospecting mining tools; gold panning kit; miners moss; hobby kits for adults; sifting screen; gold classifier Features: - MADE IN USA: Gold pans designed and manufactured in USA; they feature an 11 inch diameter and 5.5 inch base with molded top edges allow for easy handling and comfortable grip - SINGLE RIFFLE DESIGN: Gold pans feature three heavy duty single riffles for panning and capturing gold; choose from three high visibility colors, green, pink or black - SMOOTH & ROUGH SIDE WALLS: These gold pans also feature both rough wall and smooth wall sections for working through and finishing finer concentrates - DURABLE MATERIAL: Innovative and tough ABS plastic material means gold pans will stand up to lots of wear and tear in the field; rust resistant, buoyant and lightweight - SPECIFICATIONS: 11 x 2.75 inches; Weight: 0.36lbs; Colors: Pink, Black or Green === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 11 Inch Gold Pan Made in USA

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 11-in Heavy Duty Single Riffle Gold Pan

anthropic.title_differentiation: Single Riffle Design, Smooth And Rough Walls, Durable ABS Plastic, Rust Resistant, Lightweight, Three Colors

openai.title_differentiation: Made In USA, 3 Single Riffles, Smooth And Rough Walls, ABS Plastic, Lightweight, Rust Resistant, Buoyant
